subcodes.first_line: O Kazim! Upon thee be the glory of God, with the call of the divine Lote-Tree and the raising of the cry betwixt earth and heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا کاظم علیک بهاء الله مع ندآء سدره منتهی و ارتفاع صیحه مابین ارض و سماء و
subcodes.subjects: @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @idolatry, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity
